aiVerdicts: Article 33.4 check: Unsafe release threshold crossed in pit lane camera feed.
Article 54.3 review: Driver exceeded track limits at Turn 13 under pressure lap.
Article 2.5.5 pending: Pit wall communication latency may have influenced strategy call.

facts.incident: Car 04 rejoined after wide line at Turn 11, forcing Car 16 to lift by 18%.
facts.ruleSummary: Drivers must not force another driver off track and must leave a car's width when side-by-side.
facts.ruling: Likely warning unless repeated in race conditions.

facts.incident: Pit lane merge from Car 44 recorded at 44.6 km/h with oncoming car at unsafe proximity.
facts.ruleSummary: Cars may not be released from a pit stop in an unsafe condition that endangers pit lane traffic.
facts.ruling: 5-second time penalty strongly supported by telemetry envelope.

facts.incident: Track limits trigger at Turn 4 detected with all four wheels beyond white line.
facts.ruleSummary: A driver is deemed to have left the track if no part of the car remains in contact with it.
facts.ruling: Lap time deletion confirmed by sensor and video cross-check.
